ce-plan HTML view

Sample HTML Plan

Add an opt-in HTML output mode to ce-plan while leaving markdown output unchanged.

status: active type: feat date: 2026-05-08 generated_by: ce-plan
Summary Problem Frame Requirements Implementation Units U1. Shared Reference U2. ce-plan Template Test Scenarios Risks & Open Questions Sources & References
Implementation Note: This is the HTML view of a ce-plan. Run ce-plan without --html to produce the markdown plan that ce-work consumes.

Summary

This sample demonstrates the expected single-file HTML shape for ce-plan output.

Problem Frame

Long markdown plans can be hard to scan when shared outside the immediate implementation loop.

Requirements

R-ID Requirement Origin trace
R1 Support an opt-in HTML output mode. Plan requirement R1
R2 Keep default markdown output unchanged. Plan requirement R10

Implementation Units

U1. Shared Reference

Goal: Define the reusable skeleton, CSS, frontmatter contract, anchors, and SVG patterns.

Requirements: R1, R3, R5, R8

Dependencies: None

Files

  • Create: plugins/compound-engineering/skills/_shared/html-output.md
  • Test: tests/skills/ce-plan-html-output.test.ts

Approach

  • Keep shared HTML rules in one reference so later skills reuse the same contract.

Test Scenarios

Category Scenario Expected
Happy path Read the shared reference. It includes skeleton, CSS, frontmatter, anchors, SVG, and anti-bloat rules.

Acceptance

  • Shared contract is explicit and self-contained.

U2. ce-plan Template

Goal: Provide plan-specific HTML structure for requirements, implementation units, tests, risks, and sources.

Requirements: R2, R4, R6, R7, R9

Dependencies: U1

Files

  • Create: plugins/compound-engineering/skills/ce-plan/references/html-plan-template.md
  • Modify: plugins/compound-engineering/skills/ce-plan/SKILL.md

Approach

  • Branch only when HTML mode is requested and keep the markdown template path as the default.

Test Scenarios

Category Scenario Expected
Integration Invoke ce-plan with --html. The plan path ends with .html and uses the HTML template.

Acceptance

  • HTML mode is documented and scoped as read-mode.

Test Scenarios

Unit Category Scenario Expected
U1 Happy path Parse the fixture frontmatter JSON. It round-trips to the source frontmatter object.
U2 Edge case Scan for external resource loads. No stylesheet, script, font, or image is loaded from a remote URL.

Risks & Open Questions

Downstream consumers: ce-work consumes markdown today, so HTML output is explicitly read-mode until a follow-up teaches consumers to read it.

Sources & References

  • ce-plan skill: plugins/compound-engineering/skills/ce-plan/SKILL.md
  • HTML inspiration: Using Claude Code: The Unreasonable Effectiveness of HTML

Generated by ce-plan. Markdown remains the workflow source until downstream skills support HTML inputs.
